recommendations.title: Snoopy Presents: For Auld Lang Syne
recommendations.overview: After finding out her grandmother won't be visiting for Christmas, Lucy decides to cheer herself up by throwing the ultimate New Year's Eve party. Meanwhile, Charlie Brown tries to fulfill one of his resolutions before the clock strikes midnight.

recommendations.title: The Phantom Carriage
recommendations.overview: An alcoholic, abusive ne'er-do-well is shown the error of his ways through a legend that dooms the last person to die on New Year's Eve before the clock strikes twelve to take the reins of Death's chariot and work tirelessly collecting fresh souls fo

recommendations.title: The Skeleton Dance
recommendations.overview: The clock strikes midnight, the bats fly from the belfry, a dog howls at the full moon, and two black cats fight in the cemetery: a perfect time for four skeletons to come out and dance a bit.

recommendations.title: New Year's Evil
recommendations.overview: During a live punk-rock New Year's Eve TV programme, the presenter gets a phone call from a psycho calling himself "Evil" saying that when New Year's strikes in each US time zone, he will murder someone.

recommendations.title: Banana Split
recommendations.overview: After a messy breakup with her high school boyfriend, April strikes up an unexpected friendship with his new girlfriend, Clara.

recommendations.title: Clock
recommendations.overview: On the eve of her 38th birthday, a woman desperately attempts to fix her broken biological clock.

recommendations.title: Dude
recommendations.overview: Four best friends negotiate loss and major life changes during the last two weeks of high school.

recommendations.title: Once Upon a Crime
recommendations.overview: While at the royal ball with Cinderella, Little Red Riding Hood finds herself in the middle of a mystery. Can she solve the case before midnight strikes?

recommendations.title: Break
recommendations.overview: The company of three guys and two girls makes their way to the old funicular to have an unforgettable New Year’s Eve celebration at the top of the mountain. A fun adventure turns into a nightmare when the funicular stops over the abyss. Coldness, hei

recommendations.title: Cranston Academy: Monster Zone
recommendations.genres: Animation, Adventure, Science Fiction, Fantasy, Horror
recommendations.overview: An intelligent 15-year-old high school student is unexpectedly transferred to a boarding school where he opens a portal of monsters from another dimension.
